title: Yosys fails to ignore $readmemh call in generate block to non-existant file

features.name: readmemh in generate block with conditional guard
features.description: Code should include $readmemh call inside a generate block where a runtime conditional if(LUTFILE) guards the call, but Yosys still attempts to open the file during elaboration
features.snippet:
generate if (FLAG)
begin
initial if (LUTFILE)
$readmemh(LUTFILE, mem);
end else begin
end endgenerate
